title: Absentee Commercial Janitorial Business | NON-SBA
description:
This is a contract-based commercial janitorial and exterior maintenance business in Southern Orange County. The company operates with recurring, assignable contracts that provide predictable cash flow and strong revenue stability. Services include janitorial and porter work, event cleaning, exterior maintenance, and the resale of consumable supplies.

The business is home-based with no requirement for a storefront or customer-facing office. Day-to-day operations are managed by an experienced team leader and supported by established systems, allowing the owner to remain largely absentee. This opportunity is well-suited for an investor, strategic buyer, or owner-operator seeking a scalable platform with low overhead and consistent revenues.
Important: this opportunity does not qualify for SBA financing.

Ad#:2458392
